data.name: Anthophobia
data.detailed_description:
Anthophobia is side-scrolling action survival horror game where the world is falling apart by unknown infection.
Travel through the post-apocalyptic environment and fight against horde of green zombies.


Feature
  • Side-scrolling action survival horror experience
  • Unique horrifying monsters and bosses
  • Oddly adorable support NPCs
  • Over 75 pixel animation sex scenes
  • 29 illustration by artists Fenrir/Sourjelly/Tsuyuta Kome/Jotti
  • + 12 original illustration from V1.00(can be found in installed folder)
  • 6 ~ 8 hours of gameplay
data.about_the_game:
Anthophobia is side-scrolling action survival horror game where the world is falling apart by unknown infection.
Travel through the post-apocalyptic environment and fight against horde of green zombies.


Feature
  • Side-scrolling action survival horror experience
  • Unique horrifying monsters and bosses
  • Oddly adorable support NPCs
  • Over 75 pixel animation sex scenes
  • 29 illustration by artists Fenrir/Sourjelly/Tsuyuta Kome/Jotti
  • + 12 original illustration from V1.00(can be found in installed folder)
  • 6 ~ 8 hours of gameplay
data.short_description: Anthophobia is a side-scrolling action survival horror. In the wake of a global plant-based pandemic, the protagonist has kept hidden in her apartment for three months. Now that her water supplies have run dry, it is time to brave the floral armageddon and seek new shelter.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2.5 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X9.0c Compatible Card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Intel graphics family chipsets are not recommended
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.5 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X9.0c Compatible Card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Intel graphics family chipsets are not recommended

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu Mate, Ubuntu, SteamOS
  • 處理器: 2.5 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X9.0c Compatible Card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu Mate, Ubuntu, SteamOS
  • 處理器: 2.5 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X9.0c Compatible Card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
